title: QUESTIONNAIRE FOR THE SECOND PHASE OF CENSUS
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

QUESTIONNAIRE FOR THE SECOND PHASE OF CENSUS

Posted On:
25 MAR 2026 3:37PM by PIB Delhi

The questions for the second phase (Population Enumeration), including the questions on caste, will be notified before the commencement of the second phase of the Census Operation.  The Census questionnaire is finalized on the basis of inputs/suggestions received from different Ministries, Departments, Organizations, Census data users, etc. before each Census.  The questions, including on caste, for the second phase will be finalized and notified as per the established procedure.

This  was  stated  by  the  Minister  of  State  in  the  Ministry  of  Home Affairs  Shri  Nityanand Rai  in  a  written  reply  to  a  question  in  the Rajya  Sabha.

*****

RK/RR/PR/PS/SC



(Release ID: 2245021)

Visitor Counter : 48
